slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350. Sticker pop style. Cream yellow background #FFF9EC with subtle radial dot grid pattern opacity 7%. Top-right corner: small black label box with 소아과언니 white text Pretendard Bold — 4 characters only, no quotes, no decoration. Top-left small black Pretendard: PARENTING NOTE · 013. Upper body center: ONE yellow #FFD600 sticker label 여름장염 필수템 rotated -2deg, black border 1.5px solid + box-shadow 2px 2px 0 #1A1A1A. Large Pretendard ExtraBold headline two lines center — first line 경구수액 black #1A1A1A, second line 제대로 먹이는 법 black with pink #FFB4D8 highlighter thick underline stroke. Below headline: 3 inline data badge stickers in horizontal row with generous spacing — left badge yellow #FFD600 background black border + shadow contains bold black 성공률 95% top + tiny black label 정맥수액만큼 효과적 bottom, center badge purple #C8B4F8 background black border + shadow contains bold black WHO 권장 top + tiny black label 저삼투압 제제 bottom, right badge green #B8EFB8 background black border + shadow contains bold black 5분마다 top + tiny black label 소량 자주 투여 bottom. Bottom area: small minimal playful line illustration black ink only — baby bottle with ORS packet and spoon, loose cute strokes. No pixel values on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350. Sticker pop style. Background cream yellow #FFF9EC with subtle dot grid pattern. Top-right: 소아과언니 black #1A1A1A small Pretendard SemiBold — 4 characters only, no quotes, no decoration. Top-center small black Pretendard: SAVE & SHARE. Inside box: 출처 black small bold Pretendard top, then bulleted list small black: · CDC MMWR 2003 — Managing Acute Gastroenteritis, · WHO/UNICEF 2003 — Reduced Osmolarity ORS Statement, · Merck Manual 2025 — Oral Rehydration Therapy, · AAP Pediatric Care 2024 — Dehydration Guideline. Bottom: yellow #FFD600 rounded badge black border 1.5px + shadow: 소아과수첩 앱 · 성장 기록 무료 bold black Pretendard. No pixel values anywhere. No quotes anywhere on card.

common_style:
# 스티커 팝 톤 — 검증된 prompt 패턴

## 공통 규칙 (전 슬라이드)
- 배경: 크림 옐로 #FFF9EC + 미세 도트 패턴 (radial dot grid, opacity 7%)
- 텍스트: 블랙 #1A1A1A
- 강조 배지 (옐로): #FFD600
- 강조 배지 (퍼플): #C8B4F8
- 강조 배지 (그린): #B8EFB8
- 강조 배지 (핑크): #FFB4D8
- 외곽선: 1.5px solid #1A1A1A (모든 요소)
- 박스 그림자: 2px 2px 0 #1A1A1A (스티커 요소에만)
- 타이포그래피: Pretendard Black/ExtraBold (헤드라인), Pretendard Bold (배지)
- 시그니쳐: 우상단 소아과언니 #1A1A1A + 우상단 코너 NOTE 블랙 라벨 (따옴표 없이 4글자만)
- 픽셀값 텍스트 카드에 절대 금지

## 배지 색상 배정 원칙
- 옐로 #FFD600: 첫 번째 항목, 핵심 데이터
- 퍼플 #C8B4F8: 두 번째 항목, 보조 정보
- 그린 #B8EFB8: 세 번째 항목, 긍정/권장
- 핑크 #FFB4D8: 경고/주의 항목

## 스티커 요소 규칙
- 모든 스티커: border 1.5px solid #1A1A1A + border-radius 4-6px + box-shadow 2px 2px 0 #1A1A1A
- 회전 각도: -3deg ~ +3deg 랜덤 (너무 많이 기울이지 않음)
- 스티커 텍스트: 반드시 한국어 + 짧게 (4-8자 이내)

## COVER 패턴 (slide n:1)
Portrait 1080x1350. Sticker pop style. Cream yellow background #FFF9EC with subtle dot grid pattern.
Top-right: black label box with 소아과언니 white text — 4 characters only, no quotes.
Top-left small black: PARENTING NOTE · [번호].
Upper body: ONE yellow sticker label [토픽 핵심어 짧게], slightly rotated -2deg, black border + shadow.
Large ExtraBold headline two lines — [첫 줄] black #1A1A1A, [핵심 단어] with pink highlighter underline stroke.
Below headline: 3 inline data badges in a row — [항목1] yellow badge + [항목2] purple badge + [항목3] green badge, each with black border + shadow.
Each badge: bold number/keyword top + tiny label bottom.
Bottom: small minimal line illustration [토픽 관련] black ink only, playful loose strokes.
No pixel values. No quotes.

## BODY 배지 그리드 패턴 (slide n:2-8)
Portrait 1080x1350. Sticker pop style. Background #FFF9EC dot grid.
Top-right: 소아과언니 black small — 4 characters only, no quotes.
Top-left: small sticker label [섹션명] yellow, slightly rotated, black border + shadow.
Large ExtraBold headline: [앞부분] black, [핵심 단어] with yellow or pink highlighter stroke.
Content: 2x2 or 3-col badge grid.
Each badge card: black border 1.5px rounded + colored background (yellow/purple/green/pink) + bold number or keyword + small black caption below.
GENEROUS spacing between badges.
Bottom thin black divider line.
No pixel text. No quotes.

## 리스트 패턴
Numbered list: large black circle number badge (yellow fill) + bold black text right.
Each row has generous padding + thin black bottom border.

## 경고 박스 패턴
Pink #FFB4D8 background rounded box + black border 1.5px + box-shadow 2px 2px 0 #1A1A1A.
⚠️ + bold black warning text + small black detail.
Slightly rotated +1deg for sticker effect.

## 비교 패턴
Left ✓ card: green #B8EFB8 background + black border + bold black text.
Right ✗ card: pink #FFB4D8 background + black border + bold black text.
Black divider line between cards.

## OUTRO 패턴 (slide n:9)
Portrait 1080x1350. Sticker pop style. Background #FFF9EC dot grid.
Top-right: 소아과언니 black small — 4 characters only, no quotes.
Top-center small black: SAVE & SHARE.
Large ExtraBold headline center: 오늘 확인하고 black, 저장하세요 with yellow highlighter stroke.
Source box: white background rounded + black border 1.5px + shadow 2px 2px 0 #1A1A1A + generous padding.
출처 (black small bold)
· [출처 1]
· [출처 2]
· [출처 3]
Thin black horizontal divider.
소아과언니 black ExtraBold large center — NO quotes, NO decoration.
DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 gray small.
Thin divider.
@dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 black.
소아과수첩 앱 · [CTA] yellow badge with black border.
No pixel values. No quotes anywhere.
